title: Bloomberg BQL Security
description: A financial security or instrument in Bloomberg's data universe, identified by its Bloomberg ticker and associated metadata used in BQL queries for data retrieval and analysis.

ticker.description: Bloomberg ticker symbol uniquely identifying the security, including the yellow key suffix indicating asset class (e.g., 'AAPL US Equity', 'US0001M Index').

securityType.description: Classification of the security by instrument type.

exchange.description: Primary exchange where the security is listed or traded.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the security's primary listing.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the security's primary trading currency.

figi.description: Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI), a 12-character alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the instrument.

cusip.description: Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number.

sedol.description: Stock Exchange Daily Official List number.

industryGroup.description: Bloomberg Industry Classification System (BICS) industry group.

marketStatus.description: Current market status for the security.

SecurityIdentifierSet.description: A collection of alternative identifiers for cross-referencing a security across different systems.
